# canMakeTextLarger

**Instance Property**

A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made larger.

## Declaration

```swift
@MainActor var canMakeTextLarger: Bool { get }
```

## Discussion

[doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/true] if able to make the text larger; otherwise, [doc://com.apple.documentation/documentation/Swift/false].

## Changing the Text Size

- **makeTextLarger(_:)**: Action method that increases the text size by one unit.
- **canMakeTextSmaller**: A Boolean that indicates whether the text can be made smaller.
- **makeTextSmaller(_:)**: Action method that reduces the text size by one unit.
